parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
    BorderColor Black
    ArrowColor Black
}

package "Aggregate-Buch" <<Rectangle>> {
    class Buch <<root entity>>
    class AutorID <<value>>
    class BuchID <<value>>
    class Kapitel <<entity>>
    class KapitelID <<value>>
    enum Status <<value>>

    Buch o-- AutorID
    Buch --> BuchID
    Buch o-- Kapitel
    Buch --> Status

    Kapitel --> KapitelID
    Kapitel --> Status
}
@enduml
```
